title: UAE refuses to step back from moon mission despite NASA’s U-turn on Lunar Gateway
summary_full: NASA's pivot from the Lunar Gateway to a surface base has prompted the UAE to reaffirm its commitment to lunar exploration.  Instead of withdrawing, the UAE is doubling down on its participation in the Artemis program and seeking integration into the new lunar base roadmap, demonstrating flexibility and consistent ambition in deep space.
